title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. nordmarkense
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. nordmarkense, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. nordmarkense include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for consumption, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
